=== info.txt

===================
===================
Bob Dylan
March-21-2004 Kool Haus  Toronto, Ontario, Canada

Unknown lineage
received in cd-r

cd-r>EAC (secure mode)>TLH (level 8) flacfinger-md5>Maketorrent





CD1
1-intro 
2-Maggie's Farm
3-Lay, Lady, Lay 
4-Lonesome Day Blues
5-I Don't Believe You (She Acts Like We Never Have Met)
6-Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum
7-You Ain't Goin' Nowhere
8-Cold Irons Bound
9-It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic)
10-Watching The River Flow
11-Just Like A Woman
12-Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues 


CD2
1-Honest With Me
2-Shooting Star
3-Summer Days
4-(encore)
5-Cat's In The Well
6-Like A Rolling Stone
7-All Along The Watchtower
